title: helichrysum grandiceps
intro: Helichrysum grandiceps, also known as the Golden Everlasting or White Ice Plant, is a perennial succulent plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to South Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum grandiceps include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating pain. The herbal preparations of this plant can be consumed as a tea, used as a topical cream, or infused in oil for external use, making it a versatile natural remedy for various health issues.
